declaration: Generated after the final v0.7 policy and cross-archetype protocol were frozen at cdb4332 and before any cross-panel outcome was evaluated. Each base seed is the first uint32 of SHA-256('hoc-v07-final-frozen-cdb4332|cross-v1:<matchup>|0'). All 3,000 derived quartet scenarios were verified mutually disjoint and disjoint from every prior acceptance/archetype scenario and the concurrently preregistered v4/final-v2 panels.
